settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and application preferences.

settings.system_alerts_desc: Receive alerts regarding system anomalies and predictive AI outbreaks.
settings.weekly_reports_desc: Get a weekly summary of health analytics and hospital capacity delivered to your inbox.
settings.success_saved: Your changes have been successfully saved.

landing.hero_subtitle: Transform health data into actionable insights with real-time disease monitoring, GIS hospital mapping, and AI-driven trend forecasting across Egypt.
landing.features_subtitle: Everything you need to monitor, analyze, and predict health outcomes at scale.
landing.feat_gis_desc: Interactive maps with real-time hospital locations, capacity tracking, and proximity search powered by PostGIS.
landing.feat_disease_desc: Comprehensive dashboards for tracking disease prevalence, trends, and regional hotspot analysis.
landing.feat_ai_desc: Machine learning models that predict disease outbreaks and resource demands before they happen.
landing.feat_nearby_desc: Browser-based geolocation to instantly find the closest hospitals and emergency services.
landing.feat_realtime_desc: Live dashboards with KPIs, trend lines, and alerts that update as new data flows in.
landing.feat_dashboards_desc: Rich, customizable views with charts, tables, and heatmaps for every stakeholder.
landing.how_subtitle: From raw health data to life-saving decisions in three simple steps.
landing.how_step1_desc: Aggregate patient records, hospital metrics, and disease reports from across the healthcare network.
landing.how_step2_desc: Our AI engine processes data in real-time, generating trends, forecasts, and anomaly alerts.
landing.how_step3_desc: Deliver actionable intelligence to policymakers, hospital admins, and health officials.
landing.cta_subtitle: Join the platform that's helping healthcare leaders make smarter, faster, data-driven decisions.
landing.footer_desc: AI-powered health analytics platform for disease monitoring, hospital mapping, and predictive healthcare intelligence.
